companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q3 Reduce avoidable servicing and trip recovery friction
companyObjectives.statement: Make accommodation booking changes, issues, and traveler support more predictable and lower cost.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q3 Increase active, high-quality homes and hotel supply
companyObjectives.statement: Grow supply activation and retention without sacrificing trust and reservation accuracy.

objectives.title: 2026-Q3 Leisure Traveler / Stay Booker outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve support-free trip resolution by strengthening self-service modification, messaging, and issue-recovery flows.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Share of booking issues resolved through self-service or proactive coordination.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Support and recovery cost tied to policy confusion, payment ambiguity, or reservation mismatch.

objectives.title: 2026-Q3 Independent Host / Holiday Rental Operator outcome goal
objectives.objective: Improve first-booking speed and host retention by strengthening activation, guidance, and payout confidence for homes supply.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Time from listing creation to first confirmed reservation for a new host or unit.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Activation and retention of non-hotel inventory that becomes bookable and stays live on the marketplace.
